title: SOEP Variable Finder: multilingual semantic search over SOEP-Core variable metadata
description: Semantic discovery of SOEP-Core survey-variable metadata: plain-language search over German labels and English descriptions with a multilingual bge-m3 bi-encoder and a cross-encoder reranker, plus a dataset-authority prior that surfaces canonical analysis-ready variables (e.g. pgen/pglabnet) over chattier subsample items. This record is the SOEP-variable deployment of the shared GeoLAB metadata-finder codebase (the INKAR regional-indicator deployment is archived separately). Code only; no microdata included.
